phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Client Portal View + Activation Checklist — blocks all subsequent phases

context.description: API endpoints for client portal — lets clients see their practitioner, shared notes, and own data
SPA #my-practitioner tab — sidebar nav, tab panel, portal view with practitioner header, notes, blueprint read-only
Persistent activation checklist in practitioner workspace — Complete Profile → Invite Client → Chart Generated → First Note → First Brief

phases.name: Wire Existing Backends
phases.description: Zero new infrastructure — 11 items wiring backend features that are 100% built but missing frontend UI

context.description: Add <select> dropdown in New Note form — calls GET /api/practitioner/session-templates → on selection calls /hydrate → pre-fills textarea
Surface edit/delete buttons on session note rows — PUT/DELETE handlers already exist in session-notes.js
Wire sidebar Timing tab to timing.js backend — intention selector → date scoring → top 10 dates display
Add 'Compare with Client' button in practitioner client detail → POST /api/composite → display results
Wire sidebar Celebrity nav to famous.js — category filter → match grid → share card option
Permission prompt on first auth + preferences modal for transit alerts, session reminders, messages, daily check-in
Add reminder-time preferences modal to check-in tab. Wire cron trigger for daily reminders.
Add earnings card to practitioner workspace: YTD referral credits, pending rewards, referral count
Extend admin-only promo.js to allow practitioner-scoped code creation (1 active code, 10-50% off first month, tied to referral)
Add date range, event type, significance filters to diary list. Wire export button for CSV download.
Practitioners see client diary entries in client detail (opt-in by client). New query + route + access check.

phases.name: New Primitives
phases.description: Small schema changes, high compound value — divination reading log, action items, testimonials, CSV export, diary AI

context.description: Generic divination log — tarot/oracle/runes/iching/pendulum/other. 78 RWS cards, 7+ spreads, CRUD, share_with_ai, AI brief integration.
Practitioner assigns actions → client marks complete. CRUD with due dates, linked to session notes.
After N sessions, prompt client for review. Practitioner approve/hide (not edit). Display on directory profile.
Download buttons for client roster CSV, session notes CSV, readings CSV from practitioner workspace
After 10+ diary entries, LLM summarizes correlations with transits. POST /api/diary/insights → pattern summary card.

phases.name: Calendar App
phases.description: Full calendar with Google/Apple sync, transit weather, moon phases, retrogrades, optimal timing

context.description: New calendar_events table + CRUD handler + auto-generated transit/moon/retrograde events + iCal feed
Expand Google OAuth scopes for calendar, 2-way sync via separate 'Prime Self' calendar, encrypted refresh token storage
New sidebar Calendar tab with month/week/day views, color-coded event dots, transit weather bar, mood heatmap, optimal day finder
Tier-based feature gating (Free=moon, Explorer=transits, Guide=sync+sessions). Practitioner unified calendar with client color-coding.

phases.name: Marketing Toolkit
phases.description: QR codes, offer cards, share templates, bodygraph export, gift-a-reading, email signature, referral landing

context.description: Extend existing QR lib for practitioner referral URL → downloadable PNG. Display in marketing kit.
Download My Chart + Share My Chart buttons below bodygraph SVG. SVG → canvas → PNG. Practitioner watermark in portal context.
Extend shareImage.js to generate practitioner OG images (1200×630) with photo+name+specialty. KV-cached 24h.
New share card templates: transit weather, session summary, reading summary, compatibility, gift. All 5 platform formats + UTM tracking.
New section in practitioner workspace: referral link, promo code, QR code, offer card, email signature, UTM links, share snippets
Practitioner generates gift URL. Recipient gets free chart + profile synthesis + intro session prompt.
When ?ref=SLUG clicked, show full 'Meet Practitioner' template with photo, bio, CTA, promo field instead of just banner

phases.name: Communication Layer
phases.description: Practitioner-client messaging, post-session email, client journey timeline

context.description: Async messaging between practitioner and client. Push notification on new message. Portal messages tab.
Checkbox on note save → email session summary + action items + 'Book next' CTA to client
Visual milestone tracker — Joined → Chart → Profile → First Session → First Reading → 3-month mark → Review. Derived from existing timestamps.
